prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

tasks.requirement_name: Complete decomposition of feasible defense corpus
tasks.description: This task involves decomposing the feasible defense corpus into its constituent parts for further analysis or processing. It requires accessing and analyzing data related to defense strategies, potential threats, and mitigation techniques.

This task involves validating the decomposed feasible defense corpus to ensure accuracy and completeness. It requires checking for consistency, correctness, and alignment with existing knowledge or standards.

tasks.requirement_name: Generate final output in JSON format
tasks.description: This task involves generating the final output for the decomposed feasible defense corpus in JSON format. It requires using the validated decomposition results as input and formatting them according to specified standards.
